entity.summary: StableSwap automated-market-maker protocol on Cronos focused on efficient exchange of pegged and highly correlated assets through low-slippage liquidity pools.
entity.notes: Current first-party website and documentation identify Ferro as a StableSwap AMM protocol in the Cronos ecosystem with swap and liquidity-pool functionality. Exact launch date is not asserted in this initial record.

evidence.title: Ferro Protocol documentation
evidence.notes: First-party documentation describes Ferro as a StableSwap AMM protocol in the Cronos ecosystem with deep liquidity for efficient trading of pegged assets.

evidence.title: Ferro Swap documentation
evidence.notes: First-party swap guide documents token exchange within and across protocol pools, smart routing, fees, and user-defined slippage.

evidence.title: Ferro official application
evidence.notes: Current first-party application domain remains available and identifies Ferro as a decentralized exchange for stablecoin swaps on Cronos.
